modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to redirect worklist item to another user in K2 Blackpearl.

full_description_text: A user is trying to redirect a worklist item. They receive an error message. The message states that opening the worklist item is not allowed. This issue occurs within the K2 Blackpearl application.
short_description: Unable to redirect worklist item to another user in K2 Blackpearl.
description: A user is trying to redirect a worklist item. They receive an error message. The message states that opening the worklist item is not allowed. This issue occurs within the K2 Blackpearl application.
